user.title: WxAlerts — Select State
user.description: Select the state you want to monitor NWS alerts for. You can add zones from multiple states after setup.

county.title: WxAlerts — Select Zones
county.description: Search for a county to find its NWS zones. Currently monitoring **{zone_count}** zone(s): {current_zones}

data.county: County name (optional, leave blank to see all zones for {state})

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the WxAlerts API. Check your internet connection and try again.
error.no_zones_found: No zones found for that county. Try a different search term.

init.title: WxAlerts — Manage Zones
init.description: Currently monitoring **{zone_count}** zone(s). Uncheck zones to remove them.
